name: unforget
description: Single source of truth for deferred work — paused plans, audit findings, session spillover, observed-but-not-yet-fixed bugs

plugins.name: unforget
plugins.description: A single source of truth for deferred work. Enforces ONE file per project (UNFORGET.md) with four sections of 10-column rating tables and a release-cycle Target column that promotes items toward shipping.
